purpose: Gate tier for iʿrāb-affecting decisions — the GrammarProblems study's worst area. A right answer with wrong iʿrāb reasoning is unsafe; these decisions need two independent checks agreeing on conclusion AND reason.

rules.when: the decision assigns/depends on case (rafʿ/naṣb/jarr) or mood (rafʿ/naṣb/jazm)
a particle changes the verb's mood and hence tense/meaning (لَمْ+jussive→past; لَنْ+subjunctive→future)
لا النافية للجنس vs negating لا (depends on the governed noun's state)
exception (إلّا/غير/سوى) — excepted noun's case depends on positive/negative + connected/disconnected
the gloss depends on a referent (divine Name vs human attribute; proper vs common)
